channel.title: Christmas-Weather on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Christmas-Weather on smpaget blog

item.title: Brrrr.... it's a bit cold round here
item.description: Yes I can speak eskimo Sunday - minus 4C & frozen icicles hanging from the branches Monday - SNOW about an inch - Woo Hoo and minus4 again Tuesday - More Snow about 1 more inch we built a snow man Wednesday - minus 9C - frozen roads and snow, got to minus 11c on our drive to work Christmas has started.
